examples: Her paintings have a naive, dreamlike quality.
In 1961, when President Kennedy declared that America would send a man to the moon by the decade's end, those words, too, had a dreamlike quality.
For Dvorak, a Dumka inspired a rhapsodic, even dreamlike exploration of a fleeting mood.
Guillermo del Toro has a knack for making creepy movies with innovative, fantastical visuals and dreamlike narratives.
